base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of npcs_overworld — a character (npc) from 1991 final fantasy iv. Overworld NPCs — townsfolk palettes × 10-15 stock sprites. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Overworld NPCs — townsfolk palettes × 10-15 stock sprites
